content.problemStatement:
Given an array of integers, your task is to find the length of the longest subsequence where each element is strictly greater than the previous element.

A subsequence is a sequence that can be derived from an array by deleting some or no elements without changing the order of the remaining elements.


Input Format

First line contains TTT - the number of test cases
For each test case:

First line contains an integer NNN - the length of the array
Second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,...,ANA_1, A_2, ..., A_NA1​,A2​,...,AN​ - the array elements




Output Format

For each test case, print a single integer - the length of the longest increasing subsequence

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 1:

The entire array [1,2,3,4] is an increasing subsequence of length 4

Test Case 2:

One possible longest increasing subsequence is [5,11,16] of length 3
Another possible answer is [4,11,16]

Test Case 3:

One possible longest increasing subsequence is [2,5,7,101] of length 4
Another possible answer is [2,5,7,18]
